name: Stuffed Baked Ham
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen chopped kale, thawed - 10 oz
1 package Frozen chopped spinach - thawed - 10 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rind off the ham if present.
2. Trim all but about 1/4 inch of fat from the ham.
3. Using a small sharp knife, make X-shaped cuts about 2 inches deep and 1 inch apart on the fat side of the ham.
4. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Squeeze as much water as possible from the thawed kale and spinach. Place them in a food processor with the onion, watercress, celery leaves, salt, and pepper. Pulse until the vegetables are finely chopped.
6. Press the vegetable mixture into the cavities cut into the ham, packing it well.
7. Place the ham fat side up in a shallow baking pan.
8. Bake for 2 hours.
9. Stir together honey, cider vinegar, mustard, and ginger. Brush part of this mixture onto the ham.
10. Continue baking and basting for 30 minutes until the ham is richly glazed.
11. Remove the ham from the oven and let it rest for 20 minutes for easier carving.
12. Carve carefully, holding the slices to keep the stuffing in place.
13. Garnish platter with watercress if desired.
